test_cases.description: generatePseudonym returns a 44-character base64 string for valid inputs
test_cases.input_description: Valid base64-encoded Ed25519 private key (64 bytes decoded) and a non-empty channelId
test_cases.expected_output_description: A 44-character base64 string representing 32 bytes of HMAC-SHA256 output

test_cases.description: generatePseudonym is deterministic: identical inputs produce identical output
test_cases.input_description: Same valid privateKeyBase64 and channelId called twice
test_cases.expected_output_description: Both calls return the exact same base64 string

test_cases.description: generatePseudonym produces different pseudonyms for different channelIds (channel unlinkability)
test_cases.input_description: Same privateKeyBase64 with two different channelIds

test_cases.description: generatePseudonym produces different pseudonyms for different private keys (identity unlinkability)
test_cases.input_description: Two different privateKeyBase64 values with the same channelId

test_cases.description: generatePseudonym never logs private key material to console
test_cases.input_description: Valid privateKeyBase64 and channelId with console methods spied on
test_cases.expected_output_description: No console method is called with the private key string or key bytes
assertions: console.log not called with key material
console.warn not called with key material
console.error not called with key material

test_cases.description: generatePseudonym throws missing_private_key when privateKeyBase64 is undefined
generatePseudonym throws missing_private_key when privateKeyBase64 is null
generatePseudonym throws missing_private_key when privateKeyBase64 is empty string
generatePseudonym throws invalid_private_key_type when privateKeyBase64 is not a string
generatePseudonym throws private_key_too_short when decoded key is less than 32 bytes
test_cases.input_description: A base64 string that decodes to fewer than 32 bytes

test_cases.description: generatePseudonym throws invalid_base64_private_key when base64js.toByteArray throws
generatePseudonym throws missing_channel_id when channelId is undefined
generatePseudonym throws missing_channel_id when channelId is empty string
generatePseudonym throws invalid_channel_id_type when channelId is not a string
generatePseudonym throws webcrypto_unavailable when crypto.subtle is not available
generatePseudonym throws base64js_unavailable when window.base64js is not available
generatePseudonym throws hkdf_import_failure when crypto.subtle.importKey rejects
generatePseudonym throws key_derivation_failure when crypto.subtle.deriveKey rejects
generatePseudonym throws hmac_sign_failure when crypto.subtle.sign rejects
shortenPseudonym returns first N characters of a pseudonym string
test_cases.input_description: A 44-character base64 pseudonym string and length=8
test_cases.expected_output_description: An 8-character string that is the prefix of the input

test_cases.description: shortenPseudonym defaults to length 8 when length is omitted
test_cases.input_description: A 44-character base64 string with no length argument

test_cases.description: shortenPseudonym returns empty string when length is 0
shortenPseudonym returns empty string when length is negative
shortenPseudonym returns single character when length is 1
shortenPseudonym returns full string when length equals string length
shortenPseudonym returns full string when length exceeds string length
shortenPseudonym returns empty string when input is empty
shortenPseudonym throws missing_pseudonym when pseudonymBase64 is undefined
shortenPseudonym throws missing_pseudonym when pseudonymBase64 is null
shortenPseudonym throws invalid_pseudonym_type when pseudonymBase64 is not a string
shortenPseudonym throws invalid_length_type when length is not an integer
shortenPseudonym throws invalid_length_type when length is a float
shortenPseudonym returns a string synchronously (not a Promise)
test_cases.expected_output_description: A plain string, not a Promise

test_cases.description: Module exports exactly generatePseudonym and shortenPseudonym as named exports
test_cases.expected_output_description: Module has generatePseudonym and shortenPseudonym as named exports, no default export
